'''Zikri''' was a small and playful [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Deity/Legends|spirit]] in the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]<ref name="GCG" /> [[Species/Legends|species']]<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> mythology. "Zikri" was also a given name for Bothan [[Gender|females]].<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zikri was mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GCG" />
